Annette Ryan, a longtime public servant and the current deputy director at Canada’s financial intelligence agency, Fintrac

articles.title: Canadians increasingly choosing to stream with ads as prices rise: report
articles.description: Canadians subscribed to streaming platforms again faced rising costs last year, as a new report estimates the 10 leading providers hiked prices by an average of seven per cent. articles.title: Coke Canada Bottling terminates worker injured on the job, says keeping him would be too hard on the company - CBC
articles.description: Coke Canada Bottling terminates worker injured on the job, says keeping him would be too hard on the company  CBC

articles.title: Photos show scene of Air Canada jet collision in New York
articles.description: An Air Canada regional jet struck a fire truck on a runway while landing at New York’s LaGuardia Airport late Sunday, officials said. A pilot and a copilot based in Canada died, officials confirmed. The airport is expected to remain closed until 2 p.m. on Monday as the investigation continues.
